name: logistics carriers processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 10–50 invoices/month, discrepancies cause operational inefficiencies. We reconcile delivery logs with shipment invoices instead of manual reconciliation of logs and invoices.
problem_solved: discrepancies between delivery logs and shipment invoices
